Byte and ByteArray manipulation.

  Validates if a string is a hex.
  Reads a Byte at a specific index in a ByteArray,

validates if a character is alphabetic, alphanumeric, digit

String formatting and numeric display.
  Transforms a string and adds padding to the left to a given width.
  Transforms a string and adds padding to the right to a given width.
  Center a string and adds the whitespace even to the sides
  Takes an integer and transforms it to an octal String. 
  Add or remove decimal accuracy to a Float or Decimal 
  Formats time, date, datetime and duration

Cryptographic hashing and verification.

  creates reads and validates sha256 sha512 blake3 and hmac signatures

Numeric operations.

  reads abs, sqrt, floor, ceil, and log of Float and Integer. 
  round, power Float
  max, min, clamp of given Integers or Floats
  transforms clamp of given Integers or Floats
